title: What is Spring Boot and how does it differ from Spring Framework?
description: Explain the purpose of Spring Boot, its key features, and how it simplifies Spring application development compared to traditional Spring Framework.

title: Explain the @SpringBootApplication annotation
description: Describe what the @SpringBootApplication annotation does and which annotations it combines.

title: What is dependency injection in Spring?
description: Explain the concept of dependency injection and how Spring implements it using @Autowired, constructor injection, and setter injection.

title: Difference between @Component, @Service, and @Repository
description: Explain the purpose and differences between @Component, @Service, @Repository, and @Controller stereotype annotations.

title: What is application.properties and application.yml?
description: Describe how to configure Spring Boot applications using application.properties or application.yml files.

title: Explain Spring Boot Actuator
description: Describe what Spring Boot Actuator provides and list common actuator endpoints for monitoring and management.

title: What are Spring profiles?
description: Explain how Spring profiles work and how to use them for environment-specific configuration (dev, test, prod).

title: How to create a simple REST API in Spring Boot?
description: Describe the steps and annotations needed to create a basic REST controller with GET and POST endpoints.

title: What is the difference between @RequestParam and @PathVariable?
description: Explain when to use @RequestParam versus @PathVariable for extracting data from HTTP requests.

title: Explain the @Bean annotation
description: Describe how the @Bean annotation works in @Configuration classes to define Spring-managed beans.

title: Implement exception handling in Spring Boot REST API
description: Create a global exception handler using @ControllerAdvice and @ExceptionHandler to return proper HTTP status codes and error responses.

title: Explain Spring Data JPA and repository pattern
description: Describe how Spring Data JPA simplifies database access and implement a repository with custom query methods.

title: Implement request validation using Bean Validation
description: Use @Valid and validation annotations (@NotNull, @Size, @Email) to validate request bodies in REST controllers.

title: What is Spring Boot auto-configuration and how does it work?
description: Explain the auto-configuration mechanism in Spring Boot, including conditional annotations and how to create custom auto-configuration.

title: Implement pagination and sorting in Spring Data
description: Create REST endpoints that support pagination and sorting using Pageable and Sort parameters.

title: Explain Spring transaction management
description: Describe how @Transactional works, transaction propagation levels, and isolation levels in Spring.

title: Implement caching in Spring Boot
description: Configure and use Spring's caching abstraction with @Cacheable, @CacheEvict, and @CachePut annotations.

title: Create a custom Spring Boot starter
description: Design and implement a custom Spring Boot starter with auto-configuration for a reusable library.

title: Implement API versioning strategies
description: Describe and implement different REST API versioning approaches (URI, header, content negotiation) in Spring Boot.

title: Configure and use Spring Security basics
description: Set up basic authentication and authorization in a Spring Boot application using Spring Security.

title: Implement JWT authentication with Spring Security
description: Create a complete JWT-based authentication system with token generation, validation, and refresh token mechanism.

title: Design a multi-tenancy architecture in Spring Boot
description: Implement a multi-tenant application with separate database schemas or databases per tenant using Spring Boot.

title: Implement event-driven architecture with Spring Events
description: Design an event-driven system using Spring's ApplicationEvent, @EventListener, and asynchronous event processing.

title: Create a custom Spring AOP aspect for cross-cutting concerns
description: Implement aspect-oriented programming with custom aspects for logging, auditing, or performance monitoring.

title: Implement distributed tracing with Spring Cloud Sleuth
description: Set up distributed tracing across microservices using Spring Cloud Sleuth and Zipkin for request correlation.

title: Design a reactive REST API with Spring WebFlux
description: Create a non-blocking reactive REST API using Spring WebFlux, Mono, Flux, and reactive database drivers.

title: Implement circuit breaker pattern with Resilience4j
description: Add fault tolerance to microservices using Resilience4j circuit breaker, retry, and rate limiter patterns.

title: Create a custom Spring Boot metrics and monitoring solution
description: Implement custom metrics using Micrometer, integrate with Prometheus, and create Grafana dashboards.

title: Implement optimistic and pessimistic locking strategies
description: Design and implement both optimistic locking (@Version) and pessimistic locking strategies for concurrent data access.

title: Design a CQRS pattern implementation with Spring Boot
description: Implement Command Query Responsibility Segregation pattern with separate read and write models using Spring Boot.
